title: Lifecycle of a Daemon Process and Signal Handling
description: A flowchart illustrating the steps to create a robust daemon process and how it handles incoming signals like SIGHUP for reconfiguration and SIGTERM for graceful termination.
relationships: Child detaches from terminal (setsid, chdir, close fd)
Daemon enters its main service loop
Handler updates a flag or re-reads config
Main loop checks flag and acts accordingly (reload or exit)
